generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -55°C to +125°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -55°C to +125°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -55°C to +125°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance AirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance CalibratedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated temperature data from DS18S20 sensors using non-linear least squares optimization in Python Scipy to minimize residual error"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted, AirTemperatureDataTransmitted, AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model with 2 parameters assuming uniform heat distribution and no heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model with 4 parameters accounting for heatbed thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for hardware control and GPIO management"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, BangBangControlService
]

instance PythonScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization of model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationAlgorithmService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for open-source code repository management"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeManagementService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models (Model A and Model B) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter optimization using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedParameterInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance CodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Code repository management and version control"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersionInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulations inform monitoring for safety violations"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for system monitoring"
]

instance CalibratedParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters to maintain temperature within safe limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InterveneAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual intervention in case of critical safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CodeVersionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current version of the digital twin code in GitHub repository"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box with 0.03 m³ air volume as insulated container"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current isolation"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current for temperature regulation"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO pins for airflow control"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, PowerSupply, CustomPCB, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent from the controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ messages, which then actuates the heatbed and fan through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A system where the physical twin (incubator hardware) communicates with the digital twin via RabbitMQ server; the digital twin includes a controller for logic, low-level driver for hardware abstraction, simulation models, and monitoring services, with information flow between components as shown in Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates models used during system deployment, covering the 'as operated' phase of the physical twin's lifecycle for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B showed higher fidelity in predicting thermal inertia of the heatbed through experimental validation; temperature uniformity tested via three sensors with max 7°C discrepancy (reduced to 6°C at 18V fan voltage), and parameters optimized via Scipy's least-squares solver to minimize residual error."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for communication between physical and virtual components; Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server and handles all data exchange via publish-subscribe messaging."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, and simulation models are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with all components co-located for minimal latency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; MOSFETs and optocouplers isolate control signals from high-current actuation to prevent electrical hazards, though cybersecurity specifics are not addressed."
]
